programme.title: Monster High: Freaky Fusion
programme.desc: Quando i mostramici viaggiano indietro nel tempo per conoscere l'eredità dello spavento di Frankie, si trovano nei guai quando la macchina del tempo fonde accidentalmente otto mostramici in quattro mostri ibridi!

programme.title: Monster High: Friday Night Frights
programme.desc: Lo spirito scolastico non potrebbe essere più alto: la Monster High corre verso le finali dello Skullitmate Roller Maze quando Clawd e Deuce si infortunano misteriosamente e la squadra è a corto di giocatori di punta.

programme.title: Monster High: Fright On!
programme.desc: Frankie Stein, Clawdeen Wolf, Draculaura e i loro mostramici devono ripristinare l'armonia imperfettamente perfetta della Monster High quando un umano cerca di dividerli.

programme.title: Monster High: Fright, Camera, Action
programme.desc: Draculaura e i suoi migliori mostramici si lanciano in una fantastica avventura che li porta dalla Torre di Londoom a un battello fluviale infestato a New Goreleans, e infine ai luoghi glamour di Hauntlywood.

programme.title: Monster High: Ghouls Rule
programme.desc: Torna a galla un vecchio conflitto tra umani e mostri, e le cose si fanno spaventose! Per anni agli studenti della Monster High è stato detto che Halloween era una notte da passare in casa.

programme.title: Monster High: Great Scarrier Reef
programme.desc: Quando le mostramiche vengono attirate nella piscina della scuola, trasformata in un portale, si ritrovano trasportate nella Grande Barriera Corallina e trasformate in sirene!

programme.title: Monster High: Haunted
programme.desc: Quando Spectra torna alla sua vecchia scuola di fantasmi per scoprire perché la Monster High è infestata, gli altri mostri usano la sabbia di Boogey per trasformarsi in fantasmi e seguirla.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Draculaura ha una cotta per il mostro più itammeggiante della scuola! Cleo la aiuterà a rifarsi il look. Accenderà la itamma o resterà bruciata?

programme.title: Monster High: MH13 webisodes
programme.desc: Scarah aiuta le mostramiche a riconnettere i itli nel cervello di HooDude per farlo sentire bello da morire.

programme.title: Monster High: MH13 webisodes
programme.desc: Frankie elettriitca il corpo studentesco con le sue deliziose creazioni ad alto voltaggio.

programme.title: Monster High: MH13 webisodes
programme.desc: Abbey è una fan dell'inverno mentre Cupid ama la primavera, ma riuscirà Frankie a metterle d'accordo e completare il lavoro di gruppo di Scienze Pazzesche?

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Il corpo studentesco della Monster High vota per vincere un concerto di Halloween della rivelazione pop Casta e gli Incantati.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Draculaura è affascinata dalle città ultramoderne del Giappone, dalle mode pazzesche e dai giardini inquietantemente tranquilli, e decide di passare un semestre di scambio a Shibooya.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Scopri chi sono le nuove fantasmatiche mostramiche del programma Erasmus da Paura mentre intraprendono il loro viaggio degli orrori verso la Monster High.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Frankie e Lagoona scoprono che Cleo si è presa il merito del geniale progetto di Ghoulia per la fiera della scienza folle… e si aggiudica il primo premio!

programme.title: Monster High: MH4 webisodes
programme.desc: La squadra di cheerleading di Cleo la molla e le lascia le bende tutte annodate. Cleo indice provini il giorno dopo per ricostruirla. Le ragazze affolleranno la palestra o sarà un fallimento totale?

programme.title: Monster High: MH4 webisodes
programme.desc: Frankie registra una videolettera per la famiglia: Scary Murphy è ancora durissima con il team di Monster High e arrivano i rivali, i campioni uscenti Smogsnorts Vampyre Academy. Cleo arruola Ghoulia per creare una routine scientificamente imbattibile.

programme.title: Monster High: MH4 webisodes
programme.desc: Il sogno di Ghoulia di vincere il primo numero del fumetto Super Stecchito alla Neckrocon è sempre più irrangiungibile, ma una superinaspettata mostriciattola mette a posto le cose, diventando l'eroina del giorno.

programme.title: Monster High: MH4 webisodes
programme.desc: Cleo trova Deuce e sbotta, ma Operetta rivela che la canzone d’amore era per lui da dare a Cleo. Cleo corre a farla sentire alle amiche. Frankie spiega a Jackson che le piacciono lui e Hyde, ma la musica trasforma Jackson in Hyde.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Ghoulia e Frankie escogitano un piano mostruoso per dimostrare a tutta la scuola che gli zombie sanno come affrontare persino gli avversari più temibili.

programme.title: Team Hot Wheels - The Origin of Awesome
programme.sub-title: Team Hot Wheels - The Origin of Awesome
programme.desc: Nella città più lenta del mondo, quattro ragazzi scoprono che la vita è migliore a tutta velocità! Gage, Wyatt, Brandon e Rhett uniscono le forze per fermare un’auto nera misteriosa che trasforma tutto in mostri. Nasce così il Team Hot Wheels!

programme.title: Hot Wheels City

programme.desc: Hot Wheels City sotto attacco! Una creatura sparge hamburger contaminati da slime velenoso che trasforma le persone in zombie. Chase ed Elliot devono fermarla e salvare la città!

programme.title: Hot Wheels City
programme.desc: Draven ha preso il controllo di Hot Wheels City! Sta cancellando i colori da tutte le auto, ma Chase, Elliot e Sophia trovano la soluzione: il Mega Autolavaggio! Riusciranno a riportare i colori in città?

programme.title: Hot Wheels City
programme.desc: Hot Wheels City affronta la sua sfida più difficile di sempre!

programme.title: Hot Wheels City
programme.desc: Hot Wheels City affronta le creature mostruose in una dimensione parallela!

programme.title: Hot Wheels City
programme.desc: Lo scontro tra il drago gigante e il T-Rex a Hot Wheels City!

programme.title: Hot Wheels: Monster Truck Island
programme.desc: Primo round! I Giochi dell’Isola di Monster Trucks sono tornati! I nostri campioni si sfidano per vincere la coppa… ma dov’è finita? Solo il primo a trovarla potrà vincere!

programme.title: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Camp Crush
programme.sub-title: I Monster Truck Fanno Confusione In Una Selvaggia Zuffa Con Vernice!
programme.desc: I Monster Truck di Hot Wheels arrivano a Camp Crush su Monster Trucks Island per sfidarsi nella Coppa del Mondo! La prima gara è una Zuffa con Vernice: chi riuscirà a spruzzarne di più e raggiungere la cima?

programme.title: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Champions Cup
programme.sub-title: I Monster Trucks e la sfida della Mega Montagna
programme.desc: Gli Hot Wheels Monster Trucks faranno una gara di discesa. Chi vincerà?

programme.title: Matchbox Adventures
programme.desc: Corsa contro il tempo! Mason James deve recuperare un tesoro sulla scogliera prima che il vulcano erutti. Con il fidato Questor nessuna sfida è impossibile… tranne forse rispondere alla chiamata di sua madre!

programme.title: Matchbox Adventures
programme.desc: Unisciti a questa Matchbox avventura! Dai un'occhiata alla nuova serie.

programme.title: Matchbox Adventures
programme.desc: Unisciti a questa Matchbox avventura di fuoco! Guida alla ricerca dei puzzle

programme.title: Matchbox Adventures
programme.desc: Il famoso avventuriero Mason James e sua sorella Kayla devono raccogliere i medaglioni per fermare l’eruzione del MEGA vulcano. Tra enigmi e pericoli, l’avventura esplosiva ha inizio.

programme.title: Matchbox Adventures
programme.desc: Mason e Kayla aspettano un attrezzo da costruzione, ma una frana distrugge i binari. Dovranno lavorare insieme per evitare un disastro e salvare il treno.

programme.title: Max Steel - Fusion Tech
programme.desc: Dopo la sconfitta, il malvagio Mortum ritorna come un terrificante robot zombie assetato di vendetta! Nutrendosi delle onde cerebrali umane, vuole diffondere un virus tecno-organico per controllare il mondo. Max e il Team Turbo devono fermarlo!

programme.desc: Segui Pingu, un piccolo pinguino curioso e dispettoso che scopre il mondo ghiacciato del Polo Sud! Tra umorismo, risate e tenerezza, impara a conoscere la vita insieme alla sua famiglia e ai suoi amici in una serie divertente, universale e affascinante.

programme.title: Don Matteo
programme.desc: Ein katholischer Pfarrer, der Verbrechen aufklärt. So weit, so ärgerlich für die Carabinieri in Gubbio. Terence Hill als Don Matteo hilft der italienischen Polizei gerne ungefragt, aber dafür höchst erfolgreich, bei der Auflösung kniffliger Kriminalfälle.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: A newlywed couple (Terry Crews, Essence Atkins) with two children face various blended-family obstacles in this sitcom based on the 2005 film of the same name. First up

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Cash-flow problems strike the family when Suzanne's credit issues surface and Nick's work necessitates a new van.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick tries to help his mother forge bonds with Kevin and Lindsey. Meanwhile, Suzanne gets the day off.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Young Kevin gets a kick out of soccer, but Nick doesn't see the appeal. Meanwhile, Lindsey's secretiveness exasperates Suzanne, who then snoops online into her teen daughter's private life.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: When a rat gets lost in the home, Kevin scurries to care for it. Meanwhile, an ex-flame creates surging tension between Lindsey and Gigi.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Suzanne isn't a sport when Nick watches a game with friends at a sports bar with alluring waitresses. Elsewhere, the children ask for more allowance, but they reject doing any added chores.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.sub-title: My Smile is Just Skin Deep
programme.desc: With an injured star, a troublesome vehicle, and an unyielding suit production is off to a rocky start. Can the producers and director work out their differences to land this dark superhero film? Or will disputes over the ending drop them all off a tower?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: After the success of Batman 89, the studio was ready for round two, but their director was not. Given free reign, Burton and his handpicked team went wild. But would his dark vision scare away their target audience?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: A new director brings his own colorful aesthetic, but who is really in charge? A fraught production drives away his star yet delivers the toy friendly Batman the studio wanted. But when the sequel goes over the top, the franchise hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: To revive a dying franchise, the studio gives the keys to the Batmobile to an indie director whose origin story and grounded aesthetic promised to resuscitate their hero.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: On a mission to top his first outing, Nolan pushes his team harder than ever. But when tragedy strikes, no one is prepared.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: A director known for working with kids goes to great lengths to make children’s dreams come true, but the production hits a snag when taking flight proves more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The team races to the finish line on the first film, while kicking off the second. But just as everything starts to come together, the team loses a family member.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: A new director tests the team as he tries to bring real magic to Hogwarts, as well as a new Dumbledore. But will Harry Potter survive this new dark tone?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The Potter machine starts to go off the rails as the new director struggles to master the new technology. With the film still incomplete producers pull the plug and one crew member leaves the franchise for good.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: As the franchise grows more adult, fame starts to take a toll on the stars. With the kids struggling to grow up and yet another new director at the helm, will Harry Potter lose the magic?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: As the franchise comes down to its final test, making two movies for the price of one, an accident changes one crew member’s life forever

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond began with real life spy and anxious bridegroom, Ian Fleming. But it would take a bumpy road to bring this spy story to the screen. An unlikely team finds an unknown Scottish actor and faces down a troubled production to change cinema forever.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Wouldn’t Be King
programme.desc: Despite their wild success the cracks begin to show. With the departure of their star, Cubby Broccoli and Harry Saltzman must find a new actor to play the super-spy, adding tension to a strained relationship. How disastrous can their new choice be?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Though diamonds may be forever, Connery wasn’t. The producers need a new star and their choice revolutionizes the character. Embracing the cultural changes of the 70s takes Bond to new heights, but for one producer it would be the end of an era.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With an aging actor in the lead and a new director in charge, the Battle of the Bonds divides the franchise before a new gritty take on the character nearly drives it to ruin. But it's the studio that threatens to deliver the finishing blow to Bond.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With the troubles of the 80s behind them, is there a place for Bond in the modern world? With a new generation of producers in charge and the fate of the studio in their hands, can Pierce Brosnan defy expectations and revitalize the franchise?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With the troubles of the 80s behind them, is there a place for Bond in the modern world? With a new generation of producers in charge and the fate of the studio in their hands, can Pierce Brosnan defy expectations and revitalize the franchise?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Producers make a risky bet and forgo the tried-and-true formula. Acquiring the long-estranged film rights to Fleming’s first novel, Casino Royale, they recast Bond with the least likely actor imagined and see if they can reinvent the spy one more time.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Producers make a risky bet and forgo the tried-and-true formula. Acquiring the long-estranged film rights to Fleming’s first novel, Casino Royale, they recast Bond with the least likely actor imagined and see if they can reinvent the spy one more time.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Making his journey from comics, to cartoons, to TV, all the way to the hands of Sam Raimi, bringing Spider-man to life posed a major challenge. The fight to unite the rights leaves James Cameron in its wake, but will Sam be allowed to follow his heart?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Making his journey from comics, to cartoons, to TV, all the way to the hands of Sam Raimi, bringing Spider-man to life posed a major challenge. The fight to unite the rights leaves James Cameron in its wake, but will Sam be allowed to follow his heart?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: The push for action leaves the team scrambling to come up with new ways of doing things. But just when the team is ready to kick off the superhero genre, a tragedy derails their plans.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: The push for action leaves the team scrambling to come up with new ways of doing things. But just when the team is ready to kick off the superhero genre, a tragedy derails their plans.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.sub-title: Kids Want To See The Puppets
programme.desc: The pressure is on to deliver a sequel to Spider-man, without a finished script. The clock is ticking in the battle between CGI and puppets, but will the chaos derail the train?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.sub-title: Kids Want To See The Puppets
programme.desc: The pressure is on to deliver a sequel to Spider-man, without a finished script. The clock is ticking in the battle between CGI and puppets, but will the chaos derail the train?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Despite his success, Sam Raimi loses his creative freedom as Marvel and Sony’s tug of war begins to affect the story. Spider-man 3 conquers the box office but loses the fans, as Sam decides whether to carry on or walk away.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Despite his success, Sam Raimi loses his creative freedom as Marvel and Sony’s tug of war begins to affect the story. Spider-man 3 conquers the box office but loses the fans, as Sam decides whether to carry on or walk away.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Sony reboots the franchise with a new director and a new Spider-man, but can this new version compete with the rise of the MCU? When hackers attack Sony, their plans for the webslinger come undone and an unprecedented deal is struck.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Sony reboots the franchise with a new director and a new Spider-man, but can this new version compete with the rise of the MCU? When hackers attack Sony, their plans for the webslinger come undone and an unprecedented deal is struck.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Spider-man comes home to Marvel, but can Marvel and Sony get along enough to keep him there? The franchise comes full circle, bringing everyone back together in a time of crisis.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Spider-man comes home to Marvel, but can Marvel and Sony get along enough to keep him there? The franchise comes full circle, bringing everyone back together in a time of crisis.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: J.R.R Tolkien’s children’s book and trilogy take the world by storm, appealing to the fans its author would least expect. After several failed attempts to adapt the books and one half-successful animated movie, an unlikely hero takes on the film.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: J.R.R Tolkien’s children’s book and trilogy take the world by storm, appealing to the fans its author would least expect. After several failed attempts to adapt the books and one half-successful animated movie, an unlikely hero takes on the film.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: With the clock ticking Peter Jackson has to find a studio to save his work in progress. Only one studio is willing to take the gamble on three films made at once adapting an unwanted property led by an unproven director on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: With the clock ticking Peter Jackson has to find a studio to save his work in progress. Only one studio is willing to take the gamble on three films made at once adapting an unwanted property led by an unproven director on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: After a successful teaser at Cannes, the team races to complete the first film on time. Meanwhile filming begins to take a toll on the cast and crew. As injuries pile up, the most demanding scene in the trilogy nearly breaks them.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: After a successful teaser at Cannes, the team races to complete the first film on time. Meanwhile filming begins to take a toll on the cast and crew. As injuries pile up, the most demanding scene in the trilogy nearly breaks them.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: The trilogy hinges on the technological magic being developed at WETA but internal strife threatens to bring the whole thing crashing down. As the saga reaches its conclusion Peter Jackson is reluctant to let go.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: The trilogy hinges on the technological magic being developed at WETA but internal strife threatens to bring the whole thing crashing down. As the saga reaches its conclusion Peter Jackson is reluctant to let go.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: The studio that backed the films takes a gamble too far. Peter Jackson struggles in vain to avoid the burden of directing. In the midst of a grueling shoot one of the dwarves is sent packing.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: The studio that backed the films takes a gamble too far. Peter Jackson struggles in vain to avoid the burden of directing. In the midst of a grueling shoot one of the dwarves is sent packing.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: Peter Jackson pushes the bounds both on the page and on screen. But will audiences like what they see? A legendary chapter comes to a close leaving its mark on the film industry.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Master Z: el legado de Ip Man
programme.sub-title: Master Z: el legado de Ip Man
programme.desc: Tras su derrota ante el maestro Ip, Cheung Tin Chi, hace su vida con su hijo pequeño en Hong Kong, sirviendo mesas en un bar que atiende a expatriados. La mezcla de extranjeros, dinero y líderes de tríadas no tarda en atraerle de nuevo a la lucha.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: La ganadora del Premio Oscar Charlize Theron interpreta a Aeon Flux, la agente encubierta que lucha contra el gobierno totalitario de la última ciudad viva del mundo, en el siglo XXV.

programme.title: El Castigador: zona de guerra
programme.desc: Frank Castle, alias Punisher, regresa con su estilo de justiciero solitario. Cuando Frank hiere al despiadado mafioso Billy Russoti, este jura vengarse y recluta un ejército de hombres tan peligrosos como él.

programme.desc: Tras su derrota ante el maestro Ip, Cheung Tin Chi, hace su vida con su hijo pequeño en Hong Kong, sirviendo mesas en un bar que atiende a expatriados. La mezcla de extranjeros, dinero y líderes de tríadas no tarda en atraerle de nuevo a la lucha.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: La ganadora del Premio Oscar Charlize Theron interpreta a Aeon Flux, la agente encubierta que lucha contra el gobierno totalitario de la última ciudad viva del mundo, en el siglo XXV.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: La ganadora del Premio Oscar Charlize Theron interpreta a Aeon Flux, la agente encubierta que lucha contra el gobierno totalitario de la última ciudad viva del mundo, en el siglo XXV.

programme.title: El Castigador: zona de guerra
programme.desc: Frank Castle, alias Punisher, regresa con su estilo de justiciero solitario. Cuando Frank hiere al despiadado mafioso Billy Russoti, este jura vengarse y recluta un ejército de hombres tan peligrosos como él.

programme.title: El Castigador: zona de guerra
programme.desc: Frank Castle, alias Punisher, regresa con su estilo de justiciero solitario. Cuando Frank hiere al despiadado mafioso Billy Russoti, este jura vengarse y recluta un ejército de hombres tan peligrosos como él.

programme.title: The Crow en español
programme.desc: Esta exitosa película visualmente imponente y llena de acción, basada en la serie de cómics, sigue el regreso de la tumba de un joven guitarrista roquero que, junto a su prometida, son asesinados brutalmente por una pandilla de criminales.

programme.title: The Crow en español

programme.title: Mad Max: salvajes de autopista
programme.desc: En un futuro cercano y destruido, una brutal banda de moteros reina en la carretera, aterrorizando a civiles inocentes. Pero subestiman a un policía: Max (Mel Gibson). Cuando los moteros vejan a la familia de Max, entra en un frenesí de venganza.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Justicia verdadera

programme.title: Simba Prisen
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Simba: Helt ærligt
programme.desc: Anna Thimgaard fortæller åbent om sit gennembrud som content creator, sit privatliv og sin udvikling – både som menneske og creator. Et ærligt afsnit om drømme, usikkerheder, succes, kærlighed og hvad der venter i fremtiden.

programme.title: Simba: Helt ærligt
programme.desc: Erik og Tiff åbner op om deres venskab, deres “Mean Girls”-univers og deres Simba-sejr. Et stærkt, sjovt og ærligt afsnit om at bruge sin stemme, stå ved sig selv – og være sød i en hård verden.

programme.title: Simba: Helt ærligt
programme.desc: Mads Dyhr deler sin vilde rejse fra TikTok til Simba-vinder, sit liv som nybagt far og sit forhold til krop, træning og mental sundhed. Forvent masser af energi, grin, shuffling – og et uundgåeligt skrig.

programme.title: Simba: Helt ærligt
programme.desc: Jas & Mika ser tilbage på deres rolle som medskabere af Simba Prisen, deres rejse som par og creators – og hvordan det føles nu at være gæster i stedet for værter. Et ærligt afsnit fyldt med nostalgi, kærlighed og store drømme.

programme.title: Simba: Helt ærligt
programme.desc: Håb åbner op om sit liv og personlige tanker bag kameraet, sin rolle som vært på Simba Prisens guldløber, karrieredrømme, personlige valg og sit forhold til Anna Thimgaard. Glæd dig til varme øjeblikke, grin og en intens “Gæt en by”-leg.

programme.title: Simba: Helt ærligt
programme.desc: Et ærligt, rørende og sjovt afsnit med Tobi & Kamilla om livet som forældre, flytning, forlovelse, kostplan og YouTube-karrieren – samt vejen til deres første Simba. Tårer, grin og en “ulækker” konkurrence.

programme.desc: Jas & Mika ser tilbage på deres rolle som medskabere af Simba Prisen, deres rejse som par og creators – og hvordan det føles nu at være gæster i stedet for værter. Et ærligt afsnit fyldt med nostalgi, kærlighed og store drømme.
